name: Cumulative Flow (30 Days)
description: Cumulative flow by status category for last 30 days
query:
SELECT
    v_facts.full_date AS date,
    v_facts.context_json->>'column_name' AS column_name,
    SUM(v_facts.value) AS total_issues
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'cfd_count'
  AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{date_range}}]]
GROUP BY
    v_facts.full_date,
    v_facts.context_json->>'column_name',
    (v_facts.context_json->>'column_position')::int
ORDER BY
    v_facts.full_date,
    (v_facts.context_json->>'column_position')::int ASC
